shortDescription: Renovated 5-bedroom semi-detached in East Danforth with open-concept layout and finished lower level.
fullDescription: Welcome to 20 Monarch Park Avenue in the vibrant East Danforth neighbourhood. This charming semi-detached home seamlessly blends period character with modern comfort. The main living area opens onto a spacious combined living and dining area flooded with afternoon sun. The kitchen offers ample counter space, premium fixtures, and a convenient eat-in dining area. Upstairs, 5 bright bedrooms include a primary retreat with ensuite and double closets. Building amenities include a fitness centre, rooftop terrace, party room, and 24-hour concierge. The location is unbeatable: steps to TTC transit, acclaimed restaurants, and everyday shopping.
keyFeatures: Steps to TTC subway and streetcar
In-suite laundry with full-size washer and dryer
Chef’s kitchen with granite countertops and premium appliances
Fenced yard ideal for children and pets
